name_cn:
CARRYALL Small #M46203# Uninspected Version YY#
▪️Size: 29*24*12▪️
Best-selling Carryall series, highly recommended for its look.
New favorite best-seller, truly too good-looking!
First day on the market and it's been a stock-out king.
Casual, relaxed, lazy style, the look is absolutely stunning.
Fall in love at first wear, the letter bag design is more user-friendly!
Perfect choice for daily commuting or as a diaper bag, super practical.
Great looking and versatile, the king of practical and stylish best-sellers!
